title: RepoPathResolutionModes
description: Named resolution modes in crates/vox-repository `path_safety`: `resolve_strict_repo_relative_path` (relative-only, rejects `..`, join under canonical root before IO), `resolve_local_path_under_repo_root` (absolute or repo-relative existing paths, canonical prefix check), `path_relative_to_repo_root` (forward-slash relative path for metadata).
